heading: Create an Atlas Organization as an Azure Native Integration
body:
You can provision Atlas as an Azure (Microsoft Azure) Native Integration within Azure (Microsoft Azure) by filling
out a **Create a MongoDB Atlas Organization** form, specifying the organization
name, the Azure (Microsoft Azure) resource to which it will be linked, and billing plan details.

See the [Overview of Azure Native Integrations](https://aka.ms/ANI/MongoDBAtlas/Docs)
to learn more.
